name: Texas Beef Barbecue Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the excess fat from the brisket and sprinkle with Texas Sol Brisket Rub.
2. Place the brisket in the refrigerator overnight to marinate.
3. Let the meat come to room temperature before cooking.
4. Drizzle half a can of beer over the brisket.
5. Place the brisket, fat side up, in the water smoker and cook at medium temperature (about 200°F) for 3 hours and 30 minutes.
6. Remove the brisket from the smoker and place it on aluminum foil.
7. Sprinkle with more dry rub and drizzle the other half a can of beer over the meat.
8. Loosely cover the brisket with foil and return it to the smoker for an additional 3 hours and 30 minutes.
